title: Type-Safe Full-Stack App with tRPC + Drizzle
description: Build a production-ready Next.js application with end-to-end type safety: tRPC for the API layer, Drizzle ORM for the database, Auth.js for authentication, and Zod for validation — zero code generation required.

steps.description: Scaffold a Next.js App Router project with TypeScript
Add Tailwind CSS v4 for styling
Add Drizzle ORM for type-safe database queries without a code-gen step
Set up tRPC for end-to-end type-safe API procedures
Add Zod schemas for input validation on tRPC procedures
Add Auth.js v5 authentication with session access in tRPC context
Configure Vitest for unit and integration testing of tRPC procedures
Set up CI/CD pipeline with type checking and tests
